cta.title: Building something together?
cta.description: Open to senior full-stack roles and selected freelance work. Reach me on LinkedIn — I read every message.

hero.name: Alejandro Vásquez
hero.tagline: Full‑stack developer building scalable systems and process automation.
hero.description: Full Stack Developer and Technology Manager with 5+ years building web platforms, administrative portals, workflow automation and data‑driven tools — focused on scalable architecture, usability and operational impact.

about.title: About me
about.description: Full Stack Developer and Technology Manager focused on scalable web platforms and operational impact. Hands‑on with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker and JWT/RBAC. Strong product thinking (UX/UI, design systems, Figma) combined with backend engineering and workflow automation (Python/FastAPI, n8n, GitHub Actions).

softSkills.title: Core soft skills & focus
softSkills.description: Technical leadership, clear communication, continuous improvement mindset, effective prioritization and analytical problem solving. Experience guiding teams, reducing operational time through automation, and enabling adoption of new tooling while keeping empathy for end users.

methods.title: Process & methodology
methods.description: Architecture first: domain boundaries, reusable component design (design systems + Storybook), incremental API integration and continuous measurement (metrics & AI feedback). I prioritize short iterations, pragmatic documentation and scalability from the initial design.

technical.title: Technical Skills
technical.description: Modern full‑stack stack focused on React / Next.js, scalable architecture, API integration, reusable component design, performance optimization and workflow automation.

languages.title: Languages
languages.description: Primary languages used to build scalable, maintainable applications.

frameworks.title: Frameworks & Libraries
frameworks.description: Frameworks & libraries for modern UI, robust APIs, visualization and component‑driven development.

databases.title: Databases
databases.description: SQL, realtime, caching and BaaS solutions for efficient persistence and low latency.

styling.title: Styling & UI
styling.description: Systems & tools to build consistent, accessible interfaces.

devops.title: Automation & DevOps
devops.description: Automation, CI/CD, orchestration and tooling accelerating reliable delivery.

career.title: Experience
career.description: Hybrid background in IT leadership and full‑stack development: AI automation, educational platforms and infrastructure modernization for educational organizations and freelance projects.

current.description: • Lead technology strategy, IT operations and internal software development for academic and administrative processes • Designed and implemented ANGEL/Tracking, Insights and internal portals to improve student follow‑up and automate teacher‑evaluation reporting • Integrated data from Google Sheets, Google Forms and Phidias via scheduled sync, Python scripts and Docker/n8n automations • Coordinate adoption, documentation and user training

positions.title: Senior Full Stack Developer — Servicio Nacional de Aprendizaje (SENA)
positions.description: • Built an administrative portal with RBAC, role‑based permissions, module‑based tables, data validation and data virtualization • Headless CMS for dynamic content with a customized TipTap rich‑text editor and event‑calendar workflows • Backend with Next.js API Routes, PostgreSQL/Prisma, Redis cache (TTL) and JWT; UI in React, TypeScript and Tailwind

previous.description: • Configured Linux/Ubuntu servers, VPS, shared hosting, domains, web services, databases and backups • Supported networks, hardware, software and cloud services for business clients

projects.title: Artemisa - Educational Platform
projects.description: AI platform to support teacher planning. Responsive frontend with Next.js + TypeScript + Tailwind. Reusable components with ShadCN UI. Gemini API integration. FastAPI backend, PostgreSQL + Redis, Docker deployments

projects.title: ESP Tribunas Internal App
projects.description: Web application for water reports and maintenance management. React frontend with responsive dashboards. Firebase connection for cloud storage

projects.title: ESP Tribunas Web
projects.description: WordPress redesign to improve UX and digitize consultations/payments. 25% increase in user interaction

projects.title: Insights - Teacher Evaluation
projects.description: Tool for teacher evaluation with automatic feedback. Google Forms API connection. Dynamic dashboards in React + Firebase. 60% reduction in consolidation time

projects.title: Angel - Student Tracking
projects.description: Student disciplinary tracking system. Collection and processing of online surveys. Google Sheets API integration. 70% improvement in tracking efficiency

projects.title: SmileX - University Project
projects.description: Dental management system. Development of appointment scheduling module in .NET + Razor Pages. Dynamic validations to avoid appointment duplication

projects.title: LTSM Internal Systems
projects.description: Administrative institutional portal. Digitization of forms and internal processes. Development of management modules in PHP + Bootstrap. 40% reduction in paper usage

items.descriptionTitle: Student tracking platform with Phidias data sync.
items.description: Internal platform extended with tracking.liceotallersanmiguel.edu.co to synchronize absence reports from Phidias and help teachers, coordinators and psychologists track absences, disciplinary notes and counts by level/grade.
items.problem: Manual absence tracking and slow disciplinary follow-up across grades.
items.solution: Phidias auto-sync + role-based UI with photo evidence per case.
keyFeatures: Scheduled Phidias sync into a normalized model with photographic evidence.
Role‑based access (teachers, coordinators, psychologists) with module‑based permissions.
Disciplinary indicators consolidated by level and grade.
Containerized deployment with Docker and MinIO storage.
items.techStack: Next.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Docker, MinIO, Redis, Phidias integration

items.descriptionTitle: Refactored sample‑management application with RBAC and mobile evidence capture.
items.description: Refactored an existing sample‑management application to improve architecture, security and operational modules. Added role validation, photographic evidence on records and a mobile‑first experience for field operators.
items.problem: Legacy sample‑management code without role validation or mobile UX for field operators.
items.solution: Refactor with RBAC, photographic evidence and a mobile‑first interface.
items.outcome: Operators capture and audit samples on‑site without paperwork.
keyFeatures: Architecture refactor with clear module boundaries and validation.
Role‑based access control and authorization on every operation.
Photographic evidence captured and persisted alongside each record.
Mobile‑first UI optimized for field use.
items.techStack: Next.js, RBAC, photo records, mobile optimization

items.descriptionTitle: AI‑assisted teacher planning and evaluation tools.
items.description: AI‑assisted teacher planning and evaluation suite with reusable UI components, dashboards and automated feedback to reduce manual consolidation work. Connects to Google Forms for collection and to Gemini for content generation.
items.problem: Manual consolidation of teacher evaluation forms and planning docs.
items.solution: AI‑assisted suite with shared components, FastAPI services and Gemini integration.
items.outcome: 60% less consolidation time, automated feedback per teacher.
keyFeatures: Reusable component library shared across planning and evaluation.
Automated consolidation of teacher‑evaluation data.
Generative content with Gemini API to support planning.
FastAPI services backed by PostgreSQL and Redis.
items.techStack: Next.js, TypeScript, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, Firebase, Google Forms API

items.descriptionTitle: Administrative portal with RBAC and a custom headless CMS.
items.description: Administrative portal with role‑based permissions, module‑based tables and data virtualization. Includes a headless CMS with a customized TipTap editor and event‑calendar workflows tailored to institutional needs.
items.problem: Institutional admin work blocked by spreadsheets and ad‑hoc tools.
items.solution: Admin portal with RBAC, headless TipTap CMS and Redis‑cached APIs.
items.outcome: Centralized admin operations with audit‑ready role enforcement.
keyFeatures: RBAC with fine‑grained, role‑based permissions across modules.
Headless CMS with a customized TipTap rich‑text editor.
Backend on Next.js API Routes with PostgreSQL/Prisma and Redis cache (TTL).
JWT authentication and role‑based authorization end to end.
items.techStack: Next.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Redis (TTL), JWT/RBAC, TipTap, Tailwind

items.descriptionTitle: Modernized public website with clearer navigation and mobile‑friendly UX.
items.description: Modernized the public website into a clearer, more intuitive and mobile‑friendly experience, improving information structure, navigation and overall user experience.
items.problem: Legacy public site with confusing navigation and poor mobile UX.
items.solution: Modernized information architecture, mobile‑first responsive on Next.js.
items.outcome: Cleaner navigation, faster mobile experience, better SEO base.
keyFeatures: Information architecture rebuilt around user tasks.
Mobile‑first responsive design with improved performance.
Clearer navigation patterns and content hierarchy.
Built on Next.js for SEO and Core Web Vitals.
